tools.description: Get ruvllm-wasm availability and initialization status.

tools.description: Create a WASM HNSW router for semantic pattern routing. Max ~11 patterns (v2.0.1 limit).

efSearch.description: HNSW ef search parameter (higher = more accurate, slower)

tools.description: Add a pattern to an HNSW router. Embedding must match router dimensions.

tools.description: Route a query embedding to nearest patterns in HNSW index.

tools.description: Run SONA instant adaptation with a quality signal.

tools.description: Create a MicroLoRA adapter (ultra-lightweight LoRA, ranks 1-4).

tools.description: Adapt MicroLoRA weights with quality feedback.

success.description: Whether the adaptation was successful (default: true)

tools.description: Format chat messages using a template (llama3, mistral, chatml, phi, gemma, or auto-detect).

template.description: Template preset (llama3, mistral, chatml, phi, gemma) or model ID for auto-detection

tools.name: ruvllm_generate_config
tools.description: Create a generation config (maxTokens, temperature, topP, etc.) as JSON.

template.description: Gallery template name (coder, researcher, tester, reviewer, security, swarm)

tools.name: wasm_agent_prompt
tools.description: Send a prompt to a WASM agent and get a response.

tools.name: wasm_agent_tool
tools.description: Execute a tool on a WASM agent sandbox. Tools: read_file, write_file, edit_file, write_todos, list_files. Use flat format: {tool, path, content, ...}.

toolName.description: Tool name (read_file, write_file, edit_file, write_todos, list_files)

toolInput.description: Tool parameters (flat: {path, content, old_string, new_string, todos})

tools.name: wasm_agent_list
tools.description: List all active WASM agents.

tools.name: wasm_agent_terminate
tools.description: Terminate a WASM agent and free resources.

tools.name: wasm_agent_files
tools.description: Get a WASM agent's available tools and info.

tools.name: wasm_agent_export
tools.description: Export a WASM agent's full state (config, filesystem, conversation) as JSON.

tools.description: List all available WASM agent gallery templates (Coder, Researcher, Tester, Reviewer, Security, Swarm).

tools.name: wasm_gallery_search
tools.description: Search WASM agent gallery templates by query.

tools.name: wasm_gallery_create
tools.description: Create a WASM agent from a gallery template.

template.description: Template name (coder, researcher, tester, reviewer, security, swarm)

tools.name: guidance_capabilities
tools.description: List all capability areas with their tools, commands, agents, and skills. Use this to discover what Ruflo can do.

area.description: Filter to a specific area (e.g., "swarm-orchestration", "memory-knowledge"). Omit to list all areas.

format.description: Output format. "summary" lists names and descriptions, "detailed" includes tools/agents/skills.

tools.name: guidance_recommend
tools.description: Given a task description, recommend which capability areas, tools, agents, and workflow to use.

task.description: Description of what you want to accomplish.

tools.name: guidance_discover
tools.description: Discover all available agents and skills from the .claude/ directory. Returns live filesystem data.

tools.name: guidance_workflow
tools.description: Get a recommended workflow template for a task type. Includes steps, agents, and topology.

type.description: Workflow type. Options: bugfix, feature, refactor, testing, security, performance, memory, github-pr, release, swarm, learning, wasm, automation, setup

tools.name: guidance_quickref
tools.description: Quick reference card for common operations. Returns the most useful commands for a given domain.

domain.description: Domain to get quick reference for.

tools.name: autopilot_status
tools.description: Get autopilot state including enabled status, iteration count, task progress, and learning metrics.

tools.name: autopilot_enable
tools.description: Enable autopilot persistent completion. Agents will be re-engaged when tasks remain incomplete.

tools.name: autopilot_disable
tools.description: Disable autopilot. Agents will be allowed to stop even if tasks remain.

tools.name: autopilot_config
tools.description: Configure autopilot limits: max iterations (1-1000), timeout in minutes (1-1440), and task sources.

tools.name: autopilot_reset
tools.description: Reset autopilot iteration counter and restart the timer.

tools.name: autopilot_log
tools.description: Retrieve the autopilot event log. Shows enable/disable events, re-engagements, completions.

last.description: Return only the last N entries

tools.name: autopilot_progress
tools.description: Detailed task progress broken down by source (team-tasks, swarm-tasks, file-checklist).

tools.name: autopilot_learn
tools.description: Discover success patterns from past task completions. Requires AgentDB for full functionality.

tools.name: autopilot_history
tools.description: Search past completion episodes by keyword. Requires AgentDB.

tools.name: autopilot_predict
tools.description: Predict the optimal next action based on current state and learned patterns.
